# Vježba 2: Viskoznost i Površinska napetost

### Uvod: Što je zapravo viskoznost?

Prije rješavanja zadataka, važno je razumjeti da je viskoznost **unutarnje trenje** fluida. Kada se fluid giba, slojevi fluida se opiru međusobnom klizanju. 

Newtonov zakon viskoznosti glasi:
$$\tau = \mu \frac{dv}{dy}$$

*   $\tau$ [Pa] – tangencijalno naprezanje (sila trenja po jedinici površine)
*   $\mu$ [Pa·s] – dinamička viskoznost
*   $\frac{dv}{dy}$ [1/s] – gradijent brzine (promjena brzine po visini sloja)

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Osnove viskoznosti (Newtonov zakon) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-visc-basics">
    <style>
        #widget-visc-basics { max-width: 800px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }
        #widget-visc-basics .controls { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; background: #f8f9fa; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .canvas-wrapper { width: 100%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 8px; }
        #widget-visc-basics canvas { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metrics { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; background: #34495e; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 15px; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-item { text-align: center; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-label { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.8; display: block; text-transform: uppercase; }
        #widget-visc-basics .metric-value { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: bold; }
    </style>

    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Vizualizacija Newtonovog zakona viskoznosti</h3></div>
    
    <div class="controls">
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Brzina gornje ploče (v): <span id="v-val">1.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="v-slider" min="0.1" max="5.0" value="1.0" step="0.1" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Viskoznost (μ): <span id="mu-val">0.1</span> Pa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="mu-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" value="0.1" step="0.01" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label>Zračnost (δ): <span id="h-slider-val">10</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="h-slider" min="2" max="30" value="10" step="1" style="width:100%;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="canvas-wrapper">
        <canvas id="visc-canvas" width="800" height="250"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="metrics">
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">Gradijent brzine (dv/dy)</span><span class="metric-value" id="grad-out">100</span> s⁻¹</div>
        <div class="metric-item"><span class="metric-label">Smicajno naprezanje (τ)</span><span class="metric-value" id="tau-out">10.0</span> Pa</div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('visc-canvas');
        const ctx_b = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const vSl = document.getElementById('v-slider');
        const muSl = document.getElementById('mu-slider');
        const hSl = document.getElementById('h-slider');

        let particles = [];
        for(let i=0; i<100; i++) {
            particles.push({
                x: Math.random() * 800,
                y: Math.random()
            });
        }

        function draw_b() {
            const v = parseFloat(vSl.value);
            const mu = parseFloat(muSl.value);
            const h_mm = parseFloat(hSl.value);
            const h_px = h_mm * 5; 
            
            const dv_dy = v / (h_mm / 1000);
            const tau = mu * dv_dy;

            document.getElementById('v-val').textContent = v.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('mu-val').textContent = mu.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('h-slider-val').textContent = h_mm;
            document.getElementById('grad-out').textContent = Math.round(dv_dy);
            document.getElementById('tau-out').textContent = tau.toFixed(1);

            ctx_b.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const centerY = canvas.height / 2;
            const topY = centerY - h_px/2;
            const botY = centerY + h_px/2;

            // Fluid
            ctx_b.fillStyle = `rgba(52, 152, 219, ${0.1 + mu * 0.5})`;
            ctx_b.fillRect(0, topY, canvas.width, h_px);

            // Donja ploča
            ctx_b.fillStyle = '#95a5a6';
            ctx_b.fillRect(0, botY, canvas.width, 20);
            ctx_b.strokeStyle = '#7f8c8d'; ctx_b.lineWidth = 1;
            for(let x=0; x<800; x+=10) {
                ctx_b.beginPath(); ctx_b.moveTo(x, botY+20); ctx_b.lineTo(x+10, botY); ctx_b.stroke();
            }

            // Gornja ploča
            const offset = (Date.now() * 0.001 * v * 100) % 40;
            ctx_b.fillStyle = '#34495e';
            ctx_b.fillRect(0, topY - 20, canvas.width, 20);
            
            ctx_b.strokeStyle = '#2c3e50'; ctx_b.lineWidth = 2;
            for(let x = -40; x < 840; x += 40) {
                ctx_b.beginPath(); ctx_b.moveTo(x + offset, topY - 20); ctx_b.lineTo(x + offset + 10, topY); ctx_b.stroke();
            }

            // Particles
            particles.forEach(p => {
                const u = v * (1 - p.y); 
                p.x += u * 2;
                if(p.x > 800) p.x = 0;
                const py = topY + p.y * h_px;
                ctx_b.fillStyle = '#2980b9';
                ctx_b.beginPath(); ctx_b.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_b.fill();
            });

            // Velocity Profile
            ctx_b.strokeStyle = '#e67e22'; ctx_b.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx_b.beginPath(); ctx_b.moveTo(100, botY); ctx_b.lineTo(100 + v*40, topY); ctx_b.stroke();

            for(let i=0; i<=5; i++) {
                const f = i/5;
                const y = botY - f*h_px;
                const arrowL = f * v * 40;
                if(arrowL > 2) {
                    ctx_b.beginPath(); ctx_b.moveTo(100, y); ctx_b.lineTo(100 + arrowL, y);
                    ctx_b.lineTo(100 + arrowL - 5, y - 3); ctx_b.moveTo(100+arrowL, y); ctx_b.lineTo(100 + arrowL - 5, y + 3);
                    ctx_b.stroke();
                }
            }
            
            ctx_b.fillStyle = '#e67e22'; ctx_b.font = 'bold 12px Arial';
            ctx_b.fillText('Profil u(y)', 80, botY + 35);

            requestAnimationFrame(draw_b);
        }
        draw_b();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 10: Okretni moment na krnjem stošcu (Izvod)

**Tekst zadatka:** 
10. Ulje dinamičke viskoznosti $\mu$ ispunjava zračnost $\delta$. Potrebno je odrediti izraz za okretni moment potreban za rotaciju krnjeg stošca konstantnom kutnom brzinom. Prilikom proračuna zanemariti utjecaj gornjeg i donjeg horizontalnog dijela krnjeg stošca.

**Zadano:** 
* $\mu, \delta, \omega = \text{konst.}, \alpha, a, b, y$

**Odrediti:** 
* $T = ?$

**Rješenje:**
1. **Geometrija:** Radijus na visini $y$ je $r = y \cdot \tan\alpha$. Element površine plašta je $dA = 2\pi r \cdot ds = 2\pi (y \tan\alpha) \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha}$.
2. **Newtonov zakon:** Tangencijalno naprezanje je $\tau = \mu \frac{v}{\delta} = \mu \frac{\omega r}{\delta} = \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta}$.
3. **Moment sile:** Elementarni moment iznosi $dT = r \cdot \tau \cdot dA = (y \tan\alpha) \cdot \left( \frac{\mu \omega y \tan\alpha}{\delta} \right) \cdot \left( 2\pi y \tan\alpha \frac{dy}{\cos\alpha} \right)$.
4. **Integracija:** Ukupni moment dobivamo integracijom po visini od $a$ do $a+b$:
$$T = \int_a^{a+b} \frac{2\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{\delta \cos\alpha} y^3 dy = \mathbf{\frac{\pi \mu \omega \tan^3\alpha}{2 \delta \cos\alpha} [(a+b)^4 - a^4]}$$

```{=html}
<!-- GEOMETRIJSKI WIDGET ZA ZADATAK 10 - FINALNI FIX -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z10-vfinal" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <style>
        .z10-v7-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 20px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { .z10-v7-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .canvas-stack-v7 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; }
        .canvas-box-v7 { position: relative; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
        .box-label-v7 { position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 15px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: bold; color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 1px; }
        .results-panel-v7 { background: #2d3748; color: #fff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 15px; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:800;">⚙️ Okretni moment na krnjem stošcu</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#64748b;">Analiza zračnosti i profila brzine u presjeku</p>
    </div>
    
    <div class="z10-v7-grid">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#f8fafc; padding:20px; border-radius:15px; border:1px solid #edf2f7;">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Visina baze (a): <span id="z10-v7-val-a">80</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-a" min="20" max="150" value="80" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Visina stošca (b): <span id="z10-v7-val-b">150</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-b" min="50" max="250" value="150" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:5px;">Kut nagiba (α): <span id="z10-v7-val-alpha">30</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-alpha" min="5" max="60" value="30" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:bold; color:#e53e3e; margin-bottom:5px;">Pozicija presjeka (y): <span id="z10-v7-val-y">150</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z10-v7-slider-y" min="20" max="400" value="150" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="results-panel-v7">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Ukupni moment (T)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:900; color:#63b3ed;"><span id="z10-v7-res-t">0.000</span> Nm</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.75rem; margin-top:10px; border-top:1px solid #4a5568; padding-top:5px;">
                    Radijus na visini y: <b id="z10-v7-res-r">0</b> mm
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="canvas-stack-v7">
            <div class="canvas-box-v7" style="height:280px;">
                <span class="box-label-v7">NACRT (UZDUŽNI PROFIL)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-z10-v7-side" width="500" height="280" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="canvas-box-v7" style="height:220px; border-color:#bee3f8; background:#f0f9ff;">
                <span class="box-label-v7" style="color:#2b6cb0;">TLOCRT (PRESJEK NA VISINI y) - PROFIL u(r)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-z10-v7-top" width="500" height="220" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cSide = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-v7-side');
        const cTop = document.getElementById('canvas-z10-v7-top');
        if (!cSide || !cTop) return;
        const ctx_s10 = cSide.getContext('2d');
        const ctx_t10 = cTop.getContext('2d');
        
        const slA = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-a');
        const slB = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-b');
        const slAlpha = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-alpha');
        const slY = document.getElementById('z10-v7-slider-y');

        function update_z10() {
            const a = parseFloat(slA.value);
            const b = parseFloat(slB.value);
            const alpha_deg = parseFloat(slAlpha.value);
            const alpha = alpha_deg * Math.PI / 180;
            
            slY.min = a;
            slY.max = a + b;
            let y = parseFloat(slY.value);
            if(y < a) y = a; if(y > a+b) y = a+b;

            const mu = 0.1; const omega = 200; const delta = 0.0012;
            const r_y = y * Math.tan(alpha);
            
            const a_m = a/1000, b_m = b/1000;
            const term = (Math.pow(a_m + b_m, 4) - Math.pow(a_m, 4));
            const T = (Math.PI * mu * omega * Math.pow(Math.tan(alpha), 3) * term) / (2 * delta * Math.cos(alpha));

            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-a').textContent = a;
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-b').textContent = b;
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-alpha').textContent = alpha_deg;
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-val-y').textContent = Math.round(y);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-t').textContent = T.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z10-v7-res-r').textContent = Math.round(r_y);

            drawSide_z10(a, b, alpha, y);
            drawTop_z10(r_y, omega, delta);
        }

        function drawSide_z10(a, b, alpha, y_probe) {
            ctx_s10.clearRect(0,0,500,280);
            const cx = 250, base_line = 250, scale = 0.6;
            ctx_s10.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx_s10.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0";
            ctx_s10.beginPath(); ctx_s10.moveTo(cx, 20); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx, base_line + 20); ctx_s10.stroke();
            ctx_s10.setLineDash([]);
            const r1 = a * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const r2 = (a+b) * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const y1 = base_line - a * scale;
            const y2 = base_line - (a+b) * scale;
            ctx_s10.beginPath();
            ctx_s10.moveTo(cx - r1, y1); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx + r1, y1);
            ctx_s10.lineTo(cx + r2, y2); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx - r2, y2);
            ctx_s10.closePath();
            ctx_s10.fillStyle = "rgba(66, 153, 225, 0.15)"; ctx_s10.fill();
            ctx_s10.strokeStyle = "#2c5282"; ctx_s10.lineWidth = 2; ctx_s10.stroke();
            const r_p = y_probe * Math.tan(alpha) * scale;
            const py = base_line - y_probe * scale;
            ctx_s10.fillStyle = "rgba(229, 62, 62, 0.8)";
            ctx_s10.fillRect(cx - r_p, py - 2, 2 * r_p, 4);
            ctx_s10.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx_s10.beginPath();
            ctx_s10.moveTo(cx + r_p + 10, py); ctx_s10.lineTo(cx + r_p + 40, py); ctx_s10.stroke();
            ctx_s10.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx_s10.font = "bold 11px Arial";
            ctx_s10.fillText("dA (na visini y)", cx + r_p + 45, py + 4);
        }

        function drawTop_z10(r_mm, omega, delta_m) {
            ctx_t10.clearRect(0,0,500,220);
            const cx = 250, cy = 110;
            const r_px = r_mm * 0.8;
            const delta_px = 35;
            ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.arc(cx, cy, r_px + delta_px, 0, Math.PI*2);
            ctx_t10.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctx_t10.lineWidth = 3; ctx_t10.stroke();
            ctx_t10.fillStyle = "#f8fafc"; ctx_t10.fill();
            ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.arc(cx, cy, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2);
            ctx_t10.fillStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx_t10.fill();
            ctx_t10.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx_t10.lineWidth = 2; ctx_t10.stroke();
            ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.arc(cx, cy, r_px + delta_px/2, 0, Math.PI*2);
            ctx_t10.strokeStyle = "rgba(66, 153, 225, 0.2)"; ctx_t10.lineWidth = delta_px; ctx_t10.stroke();
            const numStations = 8;
            const rot = (Date.now() * 0.0008) % (Math.PI * 2);
            for(let i=0; i<numStations; i++) {
                const angle = (i/numStations) * Math.PI * 2 + rot;
                const cosA = Math.cos(angle);
                const sinA = Math.sin(angle);
                for(let j=0; j<5; j++) {
                    const f = j/4;
                    const r_curr = r_px + f * delta_px;
                    const v_factor = (1 - f);
                    const startX = cx + cosA * r_curr;
                    const startY = cy + sinA * r_curr;
                    const v_len = 45 * v_factor;
                    const vx = -sinA * v_len;
                    const vy = cosA * v_len;
                    if(v_len > 1) {
                        ctx_t10.strokeStyle = `rgba(229, 62, 62, ${0.4 + v_factor*0.6})`;
                        ctx_t10.lineWidth = 1.5;
                        ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.moveTo(startX, startY); ctx_t10.lineTo(startX + vx, startY + vy); ctx_t10.stroke();
                        ctx_t10.beginPath(); ctx_t10.moveTo(startX + vx, startY + vy);
                        ctx_t10.lineTo(startX + vx*0.8 - vy*0.05, startY + vy*0.8 + vx*0.05); ctx_t10.stroke();
                    }
                }
            }
            ctx_t10.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx_t10.font = "bold 10px Arial";
            ctx_t10.fillText("v_max = ω·r", cx + r_px/2, cy - r_px/2);
            ctx_t10.fillStyle = "#718096"; ctx_t10.fillText("ZRAČNOST δ (PROFIL BRZINE)", cx + r_px + delta_px + 10, cy);
            requestAnimationFrame(() => drawTop_z10(r_mm, omega, delta_m));
        }

        [slA, slB, slAlpha, slY].forEach(s => s.oninput = update_z10);
        update_z10();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 11: Proračun snage rotacije

**Tekst zadatka:** 
11. Krnji stožac rotira konstantnom kutnom brzinom od $200 \text{ [rad/s]}$ unutar spremnika napunjenog uljem SAE 10W, pri čemu temperatura iznosi $20 \text{ [°C]}$, dinamička viskoznost ulja za dotičnu temperaturu iznosi $0,1 \text{ [Pa s]}$, sustav i dimenzije prikazani na slici. Ukoliko pretpostavimo konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja sa svih strana krnjeg stošca od $1,2 \text{ [mm]}$, potrebno je odrediti snagu potrebnu za održavanje spomenute kutne brzine. Također odrediti i smanjenje potrebne snage kada se temperatura ulja povisi na $80 \text{ [°C]}$, pri čemu dinamička viskoznost ulja iznosi $0,0078 \text{ [Pa s]}$.

**Zadano:** 
* $D=0,12\text{ m}, L=0,12\text{ m}, d=0,04\text{ m}, \omega=200\text{ rad/s}, \delta=0,0012\text{ m}$
* $t_1=20^\circ\text{C}, \mu_{20}=0,1\text{ Pa s}, t_2=80^\circ\text{C}, \mu_{80}=0,0078\text{ Pa s}$

**Odrediti:** 
* $P_{20}=?, \Delta P_{20-80}=?$

**Rješenje:**
1. **Snaga na bazama:** $P_{baze} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 + d^4)}{32 \delta} = \mathbf{68,7 \text{ W}}$.
2. **Snaga na plaštu:** $\tan\alpha = \frac{D-d}{2L} = 0,33 \implies \alpha = 18,4^\circ$.
   $P_{plašt} = \frac{\pi \mu \omega^2 (D^4 - d^4)}{32 \delta \sin\alpha} = \mathbf{211,9 \text{ W}}$.
3. **Ukupna snaga (20 °C):** $P_{tot} = \mathbf{280,6 \text{ W}}$.
4. **Pad snage na 80 °C:** $P_{80} = P_{20} \cdot \frac{0,0078}{0,1} = \mathbf{21,9 \text{ W}}$ (Smanjenje za 92,2%).

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 11: Napredni simulator rotacijskog trenja v2 -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z11-v8" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);">
    <style>
        .z11-v8-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 25px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { .z11-v8-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .control-panel-v8 { background: #f8fafc; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        .gauge-container { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; margin-top: 15px; gap: 10px; }
        .gauge-box { background: #2d3748; color: #fff; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; flex: 1; text-align: center; }
        .heat-btn { background: #e53e3e; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; margin-top: 10px; font-weight: bold; transition: 0.2s; }
        .heat-btn:hover { background: #c53030; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:800;">⚙️ Napredni simulator rotacijskog trenja</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#64748b;">Analiza disipacije energije i utjecaja temperature</p>
    </div>
    
    <div class="z11-v8-grid">
        <div class="control-panel-v8">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700;">Vrsta ulja:</label>
                <select id="oil-select-v8" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #cbd5e0; margin-bottom:15px;">
                    <option value="0.05">SAE 10W (Lako ulje)</option>
                    <option value="0.15" selected>SAE 30 (Srednje ulje)</option>
                    <option value="0.40">SAE 50 (Gusto ulje)</option>
                </select>
            </div>

            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700;">Kutna brzina (ω): <span id="w-val-v8" style="color:#3182ce;">200</span> rad/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="w-slider-v8" min="0" max="800" step="10" value="200" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700;">Zračnost (δ): <span id="d-val-v8" style="color:#e53e3e;">1.2</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="d-slider-v8" min="0.3" max="5.0" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700;">Temperatura (T): <span id="t-val-v8">20</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="t-slider-v8" min="10" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="width:100%;">
                <button class="heat-btn" id="btn-auto-heat">🔥 Simuliraj zagrijavanje radom</button>
            </div>

            <div class="gauge-container">
                <div class="gauge-box">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.7;">SNAGA (P)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:bold;"><span id="p-res-v8">0</span> W</div>
                </div>
                <div class="gauge-box" style="border-left: 2px solid #4a5568;">
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.7;">VISKOZNOST (μ)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:bold;"><span id="mu-res-v8">0.150</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:15px;">
            <div style="position:relative; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:15px; overflow:hidden; height:220px;">
                <span style="position:absolute; top:10px; left:15px; font-size:0.6rem; font-weight:bold; color:#94a3b8;">NACRT SUSTAVA</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-v8-sys" width="500" height="220" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div style="position:relative; background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bee3f8; border-radius:15px; overflow:hidden; height:180px;">
                <span style="position:absolute; top:10px; left:15px; font-size:0.6rem; font-weight:bold; color:#2b6cb0;">STRUJANJE U ZRAČNOSTI (PARTICLES)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-v8-zoom" width="500" height="180" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cSys = document.getElementById('canvas-v8-sys'), cZoom = document.getElementById('canvas-v8-zoom');
        const ctx_s = cSys.getContext('2d'), ctx_z = cZoom.getContext('2d');
        const wS = document.getElementById('w-slider-v8'), dS = document.getElementById('d-slider-v8'), tS = document.getElementById('t-slider-v8'), oS = document.getElementById('oil-select-v8');
        const btnHeat = document.getElementById('btn-auto-heat');

        let rot = 0;
        let particles = Array.from({length: 60}, () => ({ x: Math.random() * 500, y_rel: Math.random() }));

        function getViscosity(baseMu, temp) {
            // Empirijska formula: mu smanjuje s temperaturom
            return baseMu * Math.exp(-0.035 * (temp - 20));
        }

        function update_v8() {
            const w = parseFloat(wS.value), d_mm = parseFloat(dS.value), baseMu = parseFloat(oS.value), T = parseFloat(tS.value);
            const mu = getViscosity(baseMu, T);
            const d_m = d_mm / 1000;
            const R1 = 0.02, R2 = 0.06, L = 0.12, alpha = Math.atan((R2-R1)/L);

            const Power = (Math.PI * mu * w*w * (Math.pow(R2,4)-Math.pow(R1,4))) / (2 * d_m * Math.sin(alpha));

            document.getElementById('w-val-v8').textContent = w;
            document.getElementById('d-val-v8').textContent = d_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('t-val-v8').textContent = Math.round(T);
            document.getElementById('mu-res-v8').textContent = mu.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('p-res-v8').textContent = Power.toFixed(1);

            // Draw System
            ctx_s.clearRect(0,0,500,220);
            rot += w * 0.0005;
            const cx = 250, cy = 110;
            
            // Oil glow based on power
            const heatIntensity = Math.min(0.6, Power / 1000);
            ctx_s.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 100, 0, ${0.05 + heatIntensity})`;
            ctx_s.fillRect(cx-120, cy-90, 240, 180);

            // Cone with heat highlight
            const grad = ctx_s.createLinearGradient(cx-80, 0, cx+80, 0);
            grad.addColorStop(0, '#2d3748'); grad.addColorStop(0.5, '#718096'); grad.addColorStop(1, '#2d3748');
            ctx_s.fillStyle = grad;
            ctx_s.beginPath(); ctx_s.moveTo(cx-30, cy+60); ctx_s.lineTo(cx+30, cy+60); ctx_s.lineTo(cx+70, cy-60); ctx_s.lineTo(cx-70, cy-60); ctx_s.closePath(); ctx_s.fill();
            
            if(Power > 500) {
                ctx_s.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 0, 0, ${(Power-500)/1000})`; ctx_s.lineWidth = 3; ctx_s.stroke();
            }

            // Draw Zoom (Particles)
            ctx_z.clearRect(0,0,500,180);
            const zx = 100, zw = 300, d_px = d_mm * 20;
            
            ctx_z.fillStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx_z.fillRect(zx + d_px, 20, 20, 140); // Wall
            ctx_z.fillStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx_z.fillRect(zx - 15, 20, 15, 140); // Cone
            
            particles.forEach(p => {
                const v_factor = (1 - p.y_rel); // Linear profile
                p.x += (w * 0.05) * v_factor;
                if(p.x > zx + d_px) p.x = zx;
                
                const py = 20 + p.y_rel * 140;
                ctx_z.fillStyle = `rgba(49, 130, 206, ${0.3 + v_factor*0.7})`;
                ctx_z.beginPath(); ctx_z.arc(p.x, py, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_z.fill();
            });

            // Velocity profile line
            ctx_z.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx_z.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx_z.beginPath(); ctx_z.moveTo(zx, 90); ctx_z.lineTo(zx + Math.min(100, w*0.3), 90); ctx_z.stroke();
        }

        let isHeating = false;
        btnHeat.onclick = () => {
            if(isHeating) return;
            isHeating = true; btnHeat.disabled = true;
            let currentT = parseFloat(tS.value);
            const targetT = Math.min(100, currentT + (parseFloat(wS.value)/10));
            const iv = setInterval(() => {
                currentT += 0.5; tS.value = currentT;
                if(currentT >= targetT) { clearInterval(iv); isHeating = false; btnHeat.disabled = false; }
            }, 30);
        };

        [wS, dS, tS, oS].forEach(el => el.oninput = update_v8);
        function anim_v8() { update_v8(); requestAnimationFrame(anim_v8); }
        anim_v8();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 12: Kapilarni porast (Voda vs Živa)

**Tekst zadatka:** 
12. Pri temperaturi 60[°C] površinska napetost žive iznosi 0,47 [N/m], dok je površinska napetost vode 0,0662 [N/m]. Potrebno je odrediti promjene kapilarnog porasta visine dotičnih tekućina kada se nalaze u kontaktu sa zrakom unutar staklene cijevi polumjera 0,3 [mm]. Kut kvašenja za živu iznosi 130°, dok za vodu iznosi 0°. Gustoća žive pri temperaturi 60[°C] iznosi 13,48 [g/cm³] , dok gustoća vode za dotičnu temperaturu iznosi 0,9837 [g/cm³] (Kraut).

**Zadano:**
* $t_1 = 60[°C], \sigma_{Hg} = 0,47 \, [N/m], \sigma_v = 0,0662 \, [N/m], R_c = 0,0003 \, [m]$
* $\theta_{Hg} = 130°, \theta_v = 0°, \rho_{Hg60} = 13480 \, [kg/m^3], \rho_{v60} = 983,7 \, [kg/m^3]$

**Odrediti:**
Promjene kapilarnog porasta visina: $h_v = ?, h_{Hg} = ?$

**Rješenje:** 
* **Voda:** $h_v = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0662 \cdot \cos 0°}{983,7 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{45,7 \, mm}$
* **Živa:** $h_{Hg} = \frac{2 \cdot \sigma \cdot \cos \theta}{\rho \cdot g \cdot R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,47 \cdot \cos 130°}{13480 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0003} = \mathbf{-15,2 \, mm}$ (kapilarna depresija)

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 12: Redizajnirana usporedna kapilarnost (FIXED) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z12-vdual-fixed" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <style>
        .capillary-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px; }
        .capillary-controls { background: #f8fafc; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        .capillary-display { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; background: #fff; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #eee; overflow: hidden; height: 450px; position: relative; }
        .capillary-label { position: absolute; top: 12px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.85rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; width: 50%; text-align: center; z-index: 10; }
        .metric-card { background: #2d3748; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:20px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:800;">🧪 Eksperiment: Kapilarnost (Voda vs. Živa)</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:#64748b;">Usporedba adhezije i kohezije pri t = 60°C</p>
    </div>

    <div class="capillary-grid">
        <div class="capillary-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:10px;">Polumjer kapilare (R): <span id="r-val-z12-dual" style="color:#3182ce; font-size:1.2rem;">0.30</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="r-slider-z12-dual" min="0.1" max="1.5" step="0.05" value="0.3" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:15px; margin-top:15px;">
                <div class="metric-card" style="border-bottom: 4px solid #3182ce;">
                    <div style="font-size:0.65rem; opacity:0.8; margin-bottom:4px;">VODA (Uspon)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:bold; color:#63b3ed;"><span id="hv-res-z12">45.7</span> mm</div>
                </div>
                <div class="metric-card" style="border-bottom: 4px solid #718096;">
                    <div style="font-size:0.65rem; opacity:0.8; margin-bottom:4px;">ŽIVA (Depresija)</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:bold; color:#a0aec0;"><span id="hhg-res-z12">-15.2</span> mm</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="capillary-display">
            <span class="capillary-label" style="left:0; color:#2b6cb0;">Voda (θ = 0°)</span>
            <span class="capillary-label" style="right:0; color:#4a5568;">Živa (θ = 130°)</span>
            <canvas id="canvas-z12-dual" width="800" height="450" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z12-dual');
        if(!canvas) return;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const rSl = document.getElementById('r-slider-z12-dual');

        const fluids = {
            water: { sigma: 0.0662, rho: 983.7, theta: 0, color: "#3182ce", light: "#ebf8ff" },
            mercury: { sigma: 0.47, rho: 13480, theta: 130 * Math.PI / 180, color: "#718096", light: "#edf2f7" }
        };

        function draw() {
            const r_mm = parseFloat(rSl.value);
            const R = r_mm / 1000;
            const g = 9.81;

            const hv = (2 * fluids.water.sigma * Math.cos(fluids.water.theta)) / (fluids.water.rho * g * R);
            const hhg = (2 * fluids.mercury.sigma * Math.cos(fluids.mercury.theta)) / (fluids.mercury.rho * g * R);

            document.getElementById('r-val-z12-dual').textContent = r_mm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('hv-res-z12').textContent = (hv * 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('hhg-res-z12').textContent = (hhg * 1000).toFixed(1);

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            const w = canvas.width;
            const h_can = canvas.height;
            const midX = w / 2;
            const baseY = 280; // Razina u spremniku
            const px_per_m = 2500; // Skaliranje

            // Separator
            ctx.fillStyle = "#e2e8f0";
            ctx.fillRect(midX - 1, 0, 2, h_can);

            const drawSection = (fluid, h_val, startX, isWater) => {
                const centerX = startX + w/4;
                const tubeW = Math.max(8, r_mm * 60);
                const h_px = h_val * px_per_m;

                // 1. Spremnik (tekućina)
                ctx.globalAlpha = 0.2;
                ctx.fillStyle = fluid.color;
                ctx.fillRect(startX + 10, baseY, w/2 - 20, h_can - baseY);
                ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;

                // 2. Cijev (donji dio uronjen)
                ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569";
                ctx.lineWidth = 3;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(centerX - tubeW/2, 40); ctx.lineTo(centerX - tubeW/2, h_can - 40);
                ctx.moveTo(centerX + tubeW/2, 40); ctx.lineTo(centerX + tubeW/2, h_can - 40);
                ctx.stroke();

                // 3. Tekućina unutar cijevi
                ctx.fillStyle = fluid.color;
                if (isWater) {
                    // USPON: Od baseY do baseY - h_px
                    ctx.fillRect(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1.5, baseY - h_px, tubeW - 3, h_can - (baseY - h_px) - 40);
                    
                    // Meniskus vode (konkavan - prema gore)
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1.5, baseY - h_px);
                    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(centerX, baseY - h_px + tubeW/3, centerX + tubeW/2 - 1.5, baseY - h_px);
                    ctx.fillStyle = "#fff"; // Režemo vrh konkavno
                    ctx.fill();
                } else {
                    // DEPRESIJA: Tekućina počinje tek od baseY - h_px (što je ispod baseY jer je h_px neg.)
                    // Prvo crtamo "zrak" u cijevi od baseY do baseY - h_px
                    ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
                    ctx.fillRect(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1.5, baseY, tubeW - 3, Math.abs(h_px));

                    // Tekućina počinje ispod
                    ctx.fillStyle = fluid.color;
                    ctx.fillRect(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1.5, baseY - h_px, tubeW - 3, h_can - (baseY - h_px) - 40);

                    // Meniskus žive (konveksan - prema dolje)
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.moveTo(centerX - tubeW/2 + 1.5, baseY - h_px);
                    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(centerX, baseY - h_px - tubeW/3, centerX + tubeW/2 - 1.5, baseY - h_px);
                    ctx.fillStyle = fluid.color;
                    ctx.fill();
                }

                // 4. Oznaka visine
                ctx.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e";
                ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
                ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]);
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(centerX + tubeW/2 + 5, baseY - h_px);
                ctx.lineTo(centerX + tubeW/2 + 40, baseY - h_px);
                ctx.stroke();
                ctx.setLineDash([]);
                
                ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e";
                ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial";
                ctx.fillText(`${(h_val*1000).toFixed(1)} mm`, centerX + tubeW/2 + 45, baseY - h_px + 5);
            };

            drawSection(fluids.water, hv, 0, true);
            drawSection(fluids.mercury, hhg, midX, false);

            // Nulta razina (Zajednička)
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
            ctx.setLineDash([10, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(20, baseY); ctx.lineTo(w-20, baseY); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b"; ctx.font = "bold 11px Arial";
            ctx.fillText("RAZINA U SPREMNIKU (h=0)", 20, baseY - 8);

            requestAnimationFrame(draw);
        }

        rSl.oninput = draw;
        draw();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 13

13. Kuglolika kap vode temperature $25\text{ [°C]}$ u dodiru sa zrakom ima promjer $0,5\text{ mm}$. Tlak unutar kapi veći je od atmosferskog tlaka za $565\text{ [Pa]}$. Potrebno je odrediti vrijednost površinske napetosti.

**Zadano:** $t_v=25^\circ\text{C}, \Delta p=565\text{ Pa}, D_k=0,0005\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $\sigma=?$

**Rješenje:**
$\Delta p = \frac{4\sigma}{D} \implies \sigma = \frac{\Delta p \cdot D}{4} = \frac{565 \cdot 0,0005}{4} = \mathbf{0,0706 \text{ N/m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 13: Redizajnirani Young-Laplace (Kap vs Mjehurić) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z13-advanced" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
    <style>
        .yl-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 25px; }
        @media (max-width: 800px) { .yl-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .yl-controls { background: #f8fafc; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        .yl-visual { background: #1a202c; border-radius: 20px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 350px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
        .type-toggle { display: flex; background: #e2e8f0; padding: 4px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .type-btn { flex: 1; padding: 10px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.3s; background: transparent; color: #64748b; }
        .type-btn.active { background: white; color: #3182ce; shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }
        .formula-box { background: #ebf8ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #3182ce; margin-top: 20px; font-family: 'serif'; font-style: italic; }
        .metric-badge { background: #2d3748; color: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:25px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-0.5px;">🧼 Fizika mjehurića: Young-Laplaceov zakon</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.95rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px;">Zašto je tlak veći unutar kapi?</p>
    </div>

    <div class="yl-grid">
        <div class="yl-controls">
            <div class="type-toggle">
                <button class="type-btn active" id="btn-drop" onclick="setYLType('drop')">💧 Kap (1 površina)</button>
                <button class="type-btn" id="id-bubble" onclick="setYLType('bubble')">🫧 Mjehurić (2 površine)</button>
            </div>

            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer (D): <span id="yl-val-d" style="color:#3182ce;">0.50</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="yl-slider-d" min="0.1" max="3.0" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Površinska napetost (σ): <span id="yl-val-sig" style="color:#38a169;">0.073</span> N/m</label>
                <input type="range" id="yl-slider-sig" min="0.010" max="0.100" step="0.001" value="0.073" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="formula-box" id="yl-formula">
                Δp = 4σ / D = 584 Pa
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top:20px; font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.5;">
                <b>Fizika:</b> Što je promjer manji, to je zakrivljenost veća, a površinska napetost "jače" stišće unutrašnjost, uzrokujući veći nadtlak.
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:15px;">
            <div class="yl-visual">
                <canvas id="canvas-yl" width="400" height="350" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="metric-badge">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Unutarnji nadtlak (Δp)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:900; color:#63b3ed;"><span id="yl-res-dp">584</span> Pa</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-yl');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slD = document.getElementById('yl-slider-d');
        const slSig = document.getElementById('yl-slider-sig');
        let currentType = 'drop';

        window.setYLType = (t) => {
            currentType = t;
            document.getElementById('btn-drop').classList.toggle('active', t==='drop');
            document.getElementById('id-bubble').classList.toggle('active', t==='bubble');
            update();
        };

        function update() {
            const D_mm = parseFloat(slD.value);
            const sig = parseFloat(slSig.value);
            const D = D_mm / 1000;
            
            // Formula: Droplet dp = 4*sig/D, Bubble dp = 8*sig/D
            const factor = currentType === 'drop' ? 4 : 8;
            const dp = (factor * sig) / D;

            document.getElementById('yl-val-d').textContent = D_mm.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('yl-val-sig').textContent = sig.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('yl-res-dp').textContent = Math.round(dp);
            document.getElementById('yl-formula').textContent = `Δp = ${factor}σ / D = ${Math.round(dp)} Pa`;

            draw(D_mm, sig, dp);
        }

        function draw(d_mm, sig, dp) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = canvas.width / 2;
            const cy = canvas.height / 2;
            const r_px = Math.max(20, d_mm * 60);

            // Shadow/Glow
            ctx.shadowBlur = 20;
            ctx.shadowColor = currentType === 'drop' ? "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.4)" : "rgba(160, 174, 192, 0.3)";

            // Draw Droplet/Bubble
            const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx - r_px/3, cy - r_px/3, r_px/10, cx, cy, r_px);
            if(currentType === 'drop') {
                grad.addColorStop(0, '#ebf8ff'); grad.addColorStop(1, '#3182ce');
                ctx.fillStyle = grad;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            } else {
                ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)";
                ctx.lineWidth = 3;
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(cx, cy, r_px, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke();
                ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1; ctx.fillStyle = "#fff"; ctx.fill(); ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
            }
            ctx.shadowBlur = 0;

            // Force Vectors (Surface Tension - Inward)
            const numArrows = 12;
            const time = Date.now() * 0.002;
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#f56565";
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            
            for(let i=0; i<numArrows; i++) {
                const ang = (i/numArrows) * Math.PI * 2 + time * 0.2;
                const cos = Math.cos(ang), sin = Math.sin(ang);
                const arrowLen = 15 + sig * 150;
                
                // Tension arrows (Red - inward)
                const x1 = cx + cos * (r_px + 5);
                const y1 = cy + sin * (r_px + 5);
                const x2 = cx + cos * (r_px - arrowLen);
                const y2 = cy + sin * (r_px - arrowLen);
                
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
                ctx.lineTo(x2 + Math.cos(ang+0.3)*5, y2 + Math.sin(ang+0.3)*5);
                ctx.moveTo(x2, y2); ctx.lineTo(x2 + Math.cos(ang-0.3)*5, y2 + Math.sin(ang-0.3)*5);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // Pressure Vectors (Internal Pressure - Outward)
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#4299e1";
            for(let i=0; i<numArrows; i++) {
                const ang = (i/numArrows) * Math.PI * 2 + time * 0.2 + (Math.PI/numArrows);
                const cos = Math.cos(ang), sin = Math.sin(ang);
                const pLen = Math.min(r_px * 0.8, dp / 20);
                
                const x1 = cx;
                const y1 = cy;
                const x2 = cx + cos * pLen;
                const y2 = cy + sin * pLen;
                
                ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
                ctx.lineTo(x2 - Math.cos(ang+0.4)*6, y2 - Math.sin(ang+0.4)*6);
                ctx.moveTo(x2, y2); ctx.lineTo(x2 - Math.cos(ang-0.4)*6, y2 - Math.sin(ang-0.4)*6);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            
            ctx.fillStyle = "white"; ctx.font = "bold 10px Arial";
            ctx.fillText("σ (Tension)", cx + r_px + 10, cy - r_px);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#63b3ed"; ctx.fillText("Δp (Pressure)", cx - 30, cy + 5);
        }

        function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); }
        slD.oninput = slSig.oninput = update;
        anim();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 14

14. Staklena cijev uronjena je u živu kao što je prikazano na slici. Temperatura iznosi $20\text{ [°C]}$. Potrebno je odrediti silu na staklenu cijev uslijed utjecaja površinske napetosti, površinska napetost žive za navedenu temperaturu iznosi $0,514 \text{ [N/m]}$.

**Zadano:** $t=20^\circ\text{C}, \sigma_{Hg-z}=0,514\text{ N/m}, d_o=35\text{ mm}=0,035\text{ m}, d_i=25\text{ mm}=0,025\text{ m}, \theta_{Hg}=180-130=50^\circ$
**Odrediti:** $F_{\sigma, s}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$F_\sigma = \sigma \cdot \pi \cdot (d_o + d_i) \cdot \cos(50^\circ) = 0,514 \cdot \pi \cdot (0,035 + 0,025) \cdot 0,642 = \mathbf{0,0623 \text{ N}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 14: Napredna analiza sila na staklenoj cijevi -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z14-advanced" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);">
    <style>
        .z14-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr; gap: 25px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { .z14-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .z14-controls { background: #f8fafc; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        .z14-visual { background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 20px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 400px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
        .force-badge { background: #2d3748; color: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 15px; text-align: center; }
        .theory-note { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #4a5568; line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 15px; padding: 12px; background: #fff; border-radius: 10px; border-left: 4px solid #4299e1; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:25px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-0.5px;">🔬 Analiza sila: Površinska napetost na cijevi</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.95rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px;">Međudjelovanje adhezije i ukupnog perimetra dodira</p>
    </div>

    <div class="z14-grid">
        <div class="z14-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Vanjski promjer (d₀): <span id="z14-val-do" style="color:#3182ce;">35</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z14-slider-do" min="30" max="60" value="35" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Unutarnji promjer (dᵢ): <span id="z14-val-di" style="color:#3182ce;">25</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z14-slider-di" min="10" max="28" value="25" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:15px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Kut kvašenja (θ): <span id="z14-val-theta" style="color:#e53e3e;">50</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="z14-slider-theta" min="0" max="180" value="50" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="theory-note">
                <b>Perimetar:</b> Sila djeluje na oba "brida" stijenke: <br>
                $L = \pi (d_o + d_i) \approx <span id="z14-calc-l">0.188</span>\text{ m}$
            </div>

            <div class="force-badge">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Vertikalna komponenta (Fz)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:900; color:#63b3ed;"><span id="z14-res-fz">0.0623</span> N</div>
                <div id="z14-dir-text" style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#a0aec0; margin-top:5px;">VUČE PREMA DOLJE</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z14-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z14-v2" width="500" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z14-v2');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slDo = document.getElementById('z14-slider-do');
        const slDi = document.getElementById('z14-slider-di');
        const slTh = document.getElementById('z14-slider-theta');

        function update() {
            const do_mm = parseFloat(slDo.value);
            const di_mm = parseFloat(slDi.value);
            const th_deg = parseFloat(slTh.value);
            const theta = th_deg * Math.PI / 180;
            
            // Koristimo sigma za živu (0.514) ako je theta > 90, inače vodu (0.073)
            const sigma = th_deg > 90 ? 0.514 : 0.073;
            const L = Math.PI * (do_mm + di_mm) / 1000;
            const Fz = sigma * L * Math.cos(theta);

            document.getElementById('z14-val-do').textContent = do_mm;
            document.getElementById('z14-val-di').textContent = di_mm;
            document.getElementById('z14-val-theta').textContent = th_deg;
            document.getElementById('z14-calc-l').textContent = L.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z14-res-fz').textContent = Math.abs(Fz).toFixed(4);
            
            const dirEl = document.getElementById('z14-dir-text');
            if(Math.abs(Fz) < 0.001) dirEl.textContent = "SILA JE NEUTRALNA";
            else dirEl.textContent = Fz > 0 ? "VUČE PREMA DOLJE (ADHEZIJA)" : "PURA PREMA GORE (KOHEZIJA)";
            dirEl.style.color = Fz > 0 ? "#68d391" : "#f6ad55";

            draw(th_deg, Fz, do_mm, di_mm);
        }

        function draw(th_deg, Fz, do_mm, di_mm) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = canvas.width / 2;
            const cy = 150;
            const wallW = 60; // Vizualna debljina stijenke u zoomu
            const liquidY = 280;

            // 1. Crtanje tekućine
            ctx.fillStyle = th_deg > 90 ? "#cbd5e0" : "#ebf8ff";
            ctx.fillRect(0, liquidY, canvas.width, canvas.height - liquidY);
            
            // 2. Crtanje presjeka stijenke cijevi (Zoomed)
            ctx.fillStyle = "#4a5568";
            ctx.fillRect(cx - wallW/2, 50, wallW, liquidY - 50 + (Fz > 0 ? 0 : 20));
            
            // 3. Meniskus
            ctx.beginPath();
            if(th_deg < 90) { // Voda - uspon uz stijenku
                ctx.moveTo(cx - wallW/2 - 40, liquidY);
                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx - wallW/2, liquidY, cx - wallW/2, liquidY - 20);
                ctx.lineTo(cx - wallW/2, liquidY);
                ctx.moveTo(cx + wallW/2 + 40, liquidY);
                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx + wallW/2, liquidY, cx + wallW/2, liquidY - 20);
                ctx.lineTo(cx + wallW/2, liquidY);
            } else { // Živa - depresija
                ctx.moveTo(cx - wallW/2 - 40, liquidY);
                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx - wallW/2, liquidY, cx - wallW/2, liquidY + 20);
                ctx.lineTo(cx - wallW/2, liquidY);
                ctx.moveTo(cx + wallW/2 + 40, liquidY);
                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx + wallW/2, liquidY, cx + wallW/2, liquidY + 20);
                ctx.lineTo(cx + wallW/2, liquidY);
            }
            ctx.fillStyle = th_deg > 90 ? "#cbd5e0" : "#ebf8ff";
            ctx.fill();

            // 4. Vektori sila (Površinska napetost σ)
            const theta_rad = th_deg * Math.PI / 180;
            const arrowLen = 60;
            
            const drawForce = (x, isLeft) => {
                const dir = isLeft ? -1 : 1;
                const angle = isLeft ? (Math.PI/2 + theta_rad) : (Math.PI/2 - theta_rad);
                
                const vx = Math.cos(angle) * arrowLen;
                const vy = Math.sin(angle) * arrowLen;
                
                // Osnovni vektor (σ)
                ctx.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e";
                ctx.lineWidth = 3;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x, liquidY + (th_deg > 90 ? 15 : -15));
                ctx.lineTo(x + vx, liquidY + (th_deg > 90 ? 15 : -15) + vy);
                ctx.stroke();
                
                // Strelica
                const headlen = 10;
                const a = x + vx, b = liquidY + (th_deg > 90 ? 15 : -15) + vy;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(a, b);
                ctx.lineTo(a - headlen * Math.cos(angle - 0.5), b - headlen * Math.sin(angle - 0.5));
                ctx.moveTo(a, b);
                ctx.lineTo(a - headlen * Math.cos(angle + 0.5), b - headlen * Math.sin(angle + 0.5));
                ctx.stroke();

                // Vertikalna komponenta (Fz)
                ctx.strokeStyle = "#4299e1";
                ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]);
                ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x + vx, liquidY + (th_deg > 90 ? 15 : -15));
                ctx.lineTo(x + vx, b);
                ctx.stroke();
                ctx.setLineDash([]);
            };

            drawForce(cx - wallW/2, true);
            drawForce(cx + wallW/2, false);

            // Labele
            ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial";
            ctx.fillText("STIJENKA CIJEVI", cx - 45, 40);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.fillText("σ", cx + wallW/2 + 35, liquidY + 60);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#4299e1"; ctx.fillText("Fz = σ·cosθ", cx + wallW/2 + 45, liquidY + (th_deg > 90 ? 40 : -40));
        }

        slDo.oninput = slDi.oninput = slTh.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 15

15. Potrebno je odrediti maksimalan promjer čelične i aluminijske kuglice koje mogu plutati na vodi zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, pri čemu temperatura vode iznosi $20\text{ [°C]}$. Gustoća čelika iznosi $7800 \text{ [kg/m³]}$, dok je gustoća aluminija $2700 \text{ [kg/m³]}$. Površinska napetost vode za dotičnu temperaturu iznosi $0,073 \text{ [N/m]}$.

**Zadano:** $t_v=20^\circ\text{C}, \rho_c=7800\text{ kg/m}^3, \rho_{Al}=2700\text{ kg/m}^3, \sigma_{v20}=0,073\text{ N/m}$
**Odrediti:** $d_{max, c}=?, d_{max, Al}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$D_{max} = \sqrt{\frac{6\sigma}{\rho g}}$
* **Čelik:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{7800 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{2,4 \text{ mm}}$
* **Aluminij:** $D = \sqrt{\frac{6 \cdot 0,073}{2700 \cdot 9,81}} = \mathbf{4,1 \text{ mm}}$

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 15: Plutajuća kuglica -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z15-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="lab-header"><h3 style="margin:0; color:#1e293b;">⛵ Fizika plutanja: Napetost vs. Težina</h3></div>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap:20px; margin-top:20px;">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
            <label>Promjer d: <span id="d-val-z15">2.0</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="d-slider-z15" min="0.5" max="6.0" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="width:100%;">
            <label style="display:block; margin-top:15px;">Materijal:</label>
            <select id="mat-select-z15" style="width:100%; padding:8px;"><option value="7800">Čelik</option><option value="2700" selected>Aluminij</option></select>
            <div id="status-z15" style="margin-top:20px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; padding:10px; border-radius:8px;">PLUTA</div>
        </div>
        <div class="visual-panel"><canvas id="canvas-z15-vfinal" width="500" height="300" style="width:100%; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:12px;"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z15-vfinal'), ctx_z15 = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const dS = document.getElementById('d-slider-z15'), mS = document.getElementById('mat-select-z15');
        function draw_z15() {
            const d_mm = parseFloat(dS.value), rho = parseFloat(mS.value), d = d_mm / 1000, sigma = 0.073, g = 9.81;
            const Fg = rho * (4/3) * Math.PI * Math.pow(d/2, 3) * g, Fs = Math.PI * d * sigma, isF = Fg <= Fs;
            document.getElementById('d-val-z15').textContent = d_mm.toFixed(1);
            const sEl = document.getElementById('status-z15'); sEl.textContent = isF ? "PLUTA ✓" : "TONE ✗";
            sEl.style.background = isF ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5"; sEl.style.color = isF ? "#27ae60" : "#e53e3e";
            ctx_z15.clearRect(0,0,500,300); const cx = 250, cy = 150, r = d_mm * 15;
            ctx_z15.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx_z15.lineWidth = 3; ctx_z15.beginPath();
            if(isF) { const dip = (Fg/Fs)*r*0.8; ctx_z15.moveTo(0,cy); ctx_z15.quadraticCurveTo(cx-r,cy,cx,cy+dip); ctx_z15.quadraticCurveTo(cx+r,cy,500,cy); ctx_z15.stroke(); ctx_z15.fillStyle="#94a3b8"; ctx_z15.beginPath(); ctx_z15.arc(cx, cy+dip-r*0.7, r, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_z15.fill(); }
            else { ctx_z15.moveTo(0,cy); ctx_z15.lineTo(500,cy); ctx_z15.stroke(); ctx_z15.fillStyle="#94a3b8"; ctx_z15.beginPath(); ctx_z15.arc(cx, 250, r, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_z15.fill(); }
        }
        dS.oninput = mS.onchange = draw_z15; draw_z15();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 16

16. Staklena cijev na slici koristi se za mjerenje pretlaka u spremniku vode $p_1$. Staklena cijev je promjera $1\text{ [mm]}$, temperatura vode iznosi $30\text{ [°C]}$. Potrebno je odrediti otklon očitanja zbog utjecaja površinske napetosti, te odrediti pravu visinu vode u staklenoj cijevi. Površinska napetost vode pri temperaturi $30\text{ [°C]}$ iznosi $7,12 \cdot 10^{-2}\text{ [N/m]}$, gustoća vode iznosi $996\text{ [kg/m³]}$, a kut kvašenja za vodu iznosi $0^\circ$.

**Zadano:** $t_v=30^\circ\text{C}, d_c=0,001\text{ m}, \sigma_{v30}=0,0712\text{ N/m}, \rho_{v30}=996\text{ kg/m}^3, \theta=0^\circ, H=0,17\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $h=?, H_0=?$

**Rješenje:**
1. Kapilarni uspon: $h = \frac{2\sigma}{\rho g R} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,0712}{996 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0005} = 29 \text{ mm}$.
2. Prava visina: $H_o = 170 - 29 = \mathbf{141 \text{ mm}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 16: Napredna vizualizacija kapilarne greške -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z16-advanced" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
    <style>
        .z16-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 25px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { .z16-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .z16-controls { background: #f8fafc; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; }
        .z16-visual { background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 400px; }
        .result-panel { background: #2d3748; color: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 15px; }
        .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 5px; }
        .legend-color { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 2px; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:25px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#1a202c; font-weight:900;">📉 Vizualizacija kapilarne greške</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.95rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px;">Razlika između očitane (H) i stvarne (H₀) visine</p>
    </div>

    <div class="z16-grid">
        <div class="z16-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer cijevi (d_c): <span id="z16-val-dc" style="color:#3182ce;">1.0</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z16-slider-dc" min="0.5" max="10.0" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width:100%;">
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;">Tlak u spremniku (p_rel): <span id="z16-val-p" style="color:#38a169;">1500</span> Pa</label>
                <input type="range" id="z16-slider-p" min="500" max="3000" step="50" value="1500" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div class="result-panel">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.8; text-transform:uppercase;">Izračunata greška (h)</div>
                <div style="font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:900; color:#63b3ed;"><span id="z16-res-h">29.8</span> mm</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.75rem; margin-top:10px; border-top:1px solid #4a5568; padding-top:10px;">
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-color" style="background:#3182ce;"></div> Očitana visina: <b id="z16-h-obs">182</b> mm</div>
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-color" style="background:#48bb78;"></div> Stvarna visina (H₀): <b id="z16-h-real">153</b> mm</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#718096; margin-top:15px; line-height:1.4;">
                *Primijetite kako kod manjih promjera tekućina "pobjegne" visoko iznad stvarne razine tlaka.
            </p>
        </div>

        <div class="z16-visual">
            <canvas id="canvas-z16-v2" width="500" height="400" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z16-v2');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slDc = document.getElementById('z16-slider-dc');
        const slP = document.getElementById('z16-slider-p');

        function update() {
            const dc_mm = parseFloat(slDc.value);
            const p_pa = parseFloat(slP.value);
            const dc = dc_mm / 1000;
            const sigma = 0.073, rho = 1000, g = 9.81;

            // h = 4*sigma / (rho*g*dc)
            const h_error = (4 * sigma) / (rho * g * dc);
            const h_real = p_pa / (rho * g);
            const h_obs = h_real + h_error;

            document.getElementById('z16-val-dc').textContent = dc_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z16-val-p').textContent = p_pa;
            document.getElementById('z16-res-h').textContent = (h_error * 1000).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z16-h-obs').textContent = Math.round(h_obs * 1000);
            document.getElementById('z16-h-real').textContent = Math.round(h_real * 1000);

            draw(h_real, h_error, dc_mm);
        }

        function draw(h_real, h_err, dc_mm) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            const cx = 350; // Pozicija cijevi
            const tankX = 150, tankY = 320, tankW = 120, tankH = 60;
            const scale = 1200; // px po metru

            // 1. Spremnik (Tank)
            ctx.fillStyle = "#edf2f7";
            ctx.fillRect(tankX - tankW/2, tankY - tankH/2, tankW, tankH);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(tankX - tankW/2, tankY - tankH/2, tankW, tankH);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial";
            ctx.fillText("SPREMNIK (p)", tankX - 40, tankY + 5);

            // 2. Spojna cijev
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(tankX + tankW/2, tankY);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, tankY);
            ctx.stroke();

            // 3. Vertikalna manometarska cijev
            const tubeW = Math.max(6, dc_mm * 15);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
            ctx.fillRect(cx - tubeW/2, 50, tubeW, tankY - 50);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx - tubeW/2, tankY);
            ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2, 50); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2, tankY);
            ctx.stroke();

            // 4. Tekućina (Voda)
            const y_base = tankY;
            const y_real = y_base - h_real * scale;
            const y_obs = y_base - (h_real + h_err) * scale;

            // Stvarna razina (Zelena)
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#48bb78"; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]);
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2 - 40, y_real); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 20, y_real); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = "#48bb78"; ctx.font = "10px Arial";
            ctx.fillText("H₀ (Prava)", cx - tubeW/2 - 80, y_real + 4);

            // Očitana razina (Plava)
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.6)";
            ctx.fillRect(cx - tubeW/2 + 1, y_obs, tubeW - 2, tankY - y_obs);
            
            // Meniskus
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2 + 1, y_obs);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(cx, y_obs + tubeW/4, cx + tubeW/2 - 1, y_obs);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.stroke();

            // Greška h (Crvena oznaka)
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 15, y_real);
            ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 15, y_obs);
            ctx.stroke();
            // Strijelice za h
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 10, y_real + 5); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 15, y_real); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 20, y_real + 5);
            ctx.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 10, y_obs - 5); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 15, y_obs); ctx.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2 + 20, y_obs - 5);
            ctx.stroke();
            
            ctx.fillStyle = "#e53e3e"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Arial";
            ctx.fillText("h (greška)", cx + tubeW/2 + 25, (y_real + y_obs)/2 + 5);
        }

        slDc.oninput = slP.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 17

17. Cijev promjera $0,75\text{[mm]}$ uronjena je u kerozin temperature $20\text{[°C]}$. Kut kvašenja između kerozina i staklene površine iznosi $26^\circ$. Potrebno je odrediti kapilarni porast kerozina u cijevi. Okolni tlak oko kerozina je atmosferski, gustoća kerozina pri $20\text{[°C]}$ iznosi $820 \text{ [kg/m³]}$, dok površinska napetost kerozina iznosi $0,028 \text{ [N/m]}$. Potrebno je odrediti promjer cijevi za koju će pogreška u očitanju zbog površinske napetosti iznositi $1 \text{ [mm]}$.

**Zadano:** $t_k=20^\circ\text{C}, d_c=0,00075\text{ m}, \sigma_{k20}=0,028\text{ N/m}, \rho_{k20}=820\text{ kg/m}^3, \theta=26^\circ, \Delta h=0,001\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $h=?, d_c \text{ za grešku 1mm}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$h = \frac{2 \sigma \cos\theta}{\rho g R_c} = \frac{2 \cdot 0,028 \cdot \cos 26^\circ}{820 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,000375} = \mathbf{16,7 \text{ mm}}$.

***

### Zadatak 18

18. Voda sa otopljenim hranjivim tvarima prenosi se u gornje dijelove biljke pomoću sitnih cjevčica djelomično kao posljedica kapilarnog efekta. Potrebno je odrediti do koje visine će se podignuti otopina vode i hranjivih tvari ukoliko je promjer cjevčica $0,005\text{[mm]}$ kao posljedica kapilarnog efekta. Otopinu aproksimirati svojajtivima vode pri temperaturi $20\text{[°C]}$, pri čemu je kut kvašenja $15^\circ$.

**Zadano:** $t_k=20^\circ\text{C}, d_c=0,000005\text{ m}, \sigma_{v20}=0,073\text{ N/m}, \theta=15^\circ, \rho_{v20}=998,2\text{ kg/m}^3$
**Odrediti:** $h=?$

**Rješenje:**
$h = \frac{2 \cdot 0,073 \cdot \cos 15^\circ}{998,2 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,0000025} = \mathbf{5,76 \text{ m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 18: Napredni simulator kapilarnosti u biljkama (Ksilem) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z18-advanced" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
    <style>
        .tree-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 30px; }
        @media (max-width: 850px) { .tree-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .tree-controls { background: #f0fdf4; padding: 25px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #dcfce7; }
        .tree-visual { background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; height: 450px; display: flex; }
        .xylem-zoom { flex: 1; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: relative; background: #fff; }
        .tree-overview { flex: 1.5; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(to top, #e2e8f0, #f8fafc); }
        .status-badge { padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; font-weight: 800; margin-top: 15px; transition: 0.3s; }
        .label-micro { position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; }
    </style>

    <div class="lab-header" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:25px;">
        <h3 style="margin:0; color:#166534; font-weight:900;">🌲 Transport vode: Kapilarnost u ksilemu</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.95rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:5px;">Kako se voda penje kroz mikroskopske kanale biljaka?</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tree-grid">
        <div class="tree-controls">
            <div class="control-group">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#166534; margin-bottom:8px;">Promjer ksilema (d): <span id="z18-val-d" style="color:#22c55e;">20</span> μm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z18-slider-d" min="5" max="100" step="1" value="20" style="width:100%;">
                <p style="font-size:0.75rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:4px;">*Uski kanali omogućuju veći uspon.</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="control-group" style="margin-top:20px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#166534; margin-bottom:8px;">Visina stabla (H): <span id="z18-val-h" style="color:#22c55e;">10</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z18-slider-h" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="10" style="width:100%;">
            </div>

            <div id="z18-status" class="status-badge" style="background:#dcfce7; color:#166534;">
                KAPILARNOST DOSTIŽE VRH ✓
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top:20px; font-size:0.85rem; color:#374151; line-height:1.6; background:#fff; padding:15px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid #dcfce7;">
                <b>Fizikalni limit:</b> 
                Maksimalni kapilarni uspon iznosi <b id="z18-res-maxh">1.5</b> m. 
                <br><br>
                <span id="z18-info-text">Kapilarnost je dovoljna za niska stabla. Za viša stabla, priroda koristi <i>transpiracijski vlak</i> (usisavanje vode uslijed isparavanja s listova).</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tree-visual">
            <!-- Mikroskopski prikaz ksilema -->
            <div class="xylem-zoom">
                <span class="label-micro">Mikroskop (Ksilem)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-z18-micro" width="180" height="450" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
            <!-- Prikaz stabla -->
            <div class="tree-overview">
                <span class="label-micro" style="left:auto; right:10px;">Stablo (H)</span>
                <canvas id="canvas-z18-tree" width="220" height="450" style="width:100%; height:100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cMicro = document.getElementById('canvas-z18-micro');
        const cTree = document.getElementById('canvas-z18-tree');
        const ctxM = cMicro.getContext('2d');
        const ctxT = cTree.getContext('2d');
        
        const slD = document.getElementById('z18-slider-d');
        const slH = document.getElementById('z18-slider-h');

        function update() {
            const d_um = parseFloat(slD.value); // Mikrometri
            const h_tree = parseFloat(slH.value); // Metri
            
            const d = d_um / 1_000_000; // Pretvorba u m
            const sigma = 0.073, rho = 1000, g = 9.81, theta = 15 * Math.PI / 180;
            
            // h = (4 * sigma * cos theta) / (rho * g * d)
            const h_cap = (4 * sigma * Math.cos(theta)) / (rho * g * d);

            document.getElementById('z18-val-d').textContent = d_um;
            document.getElementById('z18-val-h').textContent = h_tree;
            document.getElementById('z18-res-maxh').textContent = h_cap.toFixed(2);

            const status = document.getElementById('z18-status');
            const info = document.getElementById('z18-info-text');
            
            if(h_cap >= h_tree) {
                status.textContent = "KAPILARNOST DOSTIŽE VRH ✓";
                status.style.background = "#dcfce7"; status.style.color = "#166534";
                info.innerHTML = "<b>Dovoljno:</b> Za ovaj promjer ksilema, kapilarnost može sama podići vodu do listova.";
            } else {
                status.textContent = "POTREBAN TRANSPIRACIJSKI VLAK ✗";
                status.style.background = "#fee2e2"; status.style.color = "#991b1b";
                info.innerHTML = "<b>Nedovoljno:</b> Kapilarnost doseže samo <b>" + h_cap.toFixed(2) + " m</b>. Ostatak uspona obavlja isparavanje s listova (negativni tlak).";
            }

            draw(d_um, h_tree, h_cap);
        }

        function draw(d_um, h_tree, h_cap) {
            // 1. Draw Microscope View
            ctxM.clearRect(0,0,180,450);
            const cx = 90, tubeW = Math.max(15, d_um * 1.5);
            
            // Tube walls
            ctxM.fillStyle = "#f1f5f9";
            ctxM.fillRect(cx - tubeW/2 - 5, 0, tubeW + 10, 450);
            ctxM.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctxM.lineWidth = 2;
            ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2, 0); ctxM.lineTo(cx - tubeW/2, 450);
            ctxM.moveTo(cx + tubeW/2, 0); ctxM.lineTo(cx + tubeW/2, 450); ctxM.stroke();
            
            // Water rising (animated feel)
            const time = Date.now() * 0.001;
            ctxM.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.6)";
            ctxM.fillRect(cx - tubeW/2 + 1, 150, tubeW - 2, 300);
            
            // Meniscus
            ctxM.beginPath();
            ctxM.moveTo(cx - tubeW/2 + 1, 150);
            ctxM.quadraticCurveTo(cx, 150 + tubeW/3, cx + tubeW/2 - 1, 150);
            ctxM.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctxM.lineWidth = 3; ctxM.stroke();
            
            // Adhesion molecules
            for(let y = 160; y < 450; y += 40) {
                ctxM.fillStyle = "#60a5fa";
                ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.arc(cx - tubeW/2 + 4, y + Math.sin(time + y)*5, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxM.fill();
                ctxM.beginPath(); ctxM.arc(cx + tubeW/2 - 4, y + Math.cos(time + y)*5, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxM.fill();
            }

            // 2. Draw Tree View
            ctxT.clearRect(0,0,220,450);
            const baseY = 400;
            const treeScale = 300 / 50; // 300px = 50m
            
            // Ground
            ctxT.fillStyle = "#78350f"; ctxT.fillRect(0, baseY, 220, 50);
            
            // Tree trunk
            const h_px = h_tree * treeScale;
            ctxT.fillStyle = "#451a03";
            ctxT.fillRect(100, baseY - h_px, 20, h_px);
            
            // Leaves
            ctxT.fillStyle = "#15803d";
            ctxT.beginPath(); ctxT.arc(110, baseY - h_px, 40, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxT.fill();
            
            // Capillary Water Level (Blue line)
            const cap_px = Math.min(h_cap, 60) * treeScale; // Limit visualization to 60m for scale
            ctxT.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctxT.lineWidth = 4;
            ctxT.beginPath(); ctxT.moveTo(110, baseY); ctxT.lineTo(110, baseY - cap_px); ctxT.stroke();
            
            // Label h_cap
            ctxT.fillStyle = "#2563eb"; ctxT.font = "bold 11px Arial";
            ctxT.fillText("Uspon: " + h_cap.toFixed(1) + "m", 125, baseY - cap_px + 5);
            ctxT.setLineDash([3,3]);
            ctxT.beginPath(); ctxT.moveTo(110, baseY - cap_px); ctxT.lineTo(180, baseY - cap_px); ctxT.stroke();
            ctxT.setLineDash([]);
        }

        function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); }
        slD.oninput = slH.oninput = update;
        anim();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 19

19. Sustav na slici nalazi se na temperaturi $20\text{[°C]}$. Ukoliko atmosferski tlak iznosi $101,03 \text{ [kPa]}$, a apsolutni tlak na dnu spremnika iznosi $217,7 \text{ [kPa]}$, potrebno je odrediti relativnu gustoću maslinovog ulja. Relativna gustoća ulja SAE 30 za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $0,89$, dok relativna gustoća žive za zadanu temperaturu iznosi $13,6$.

**Zadano:** $t_1=20^\circ\text{C}, p_{atm}=101030\text{ Pa}, p_d=217700\text{ Pa}, \bar{\rho}_{SAE30\_20}=0,89, \bar{\rho}_{Hg20}=13,6, h_{SAE}=0,4\text{ m}, h_u=2,9\text{ m}, h_v=2,5\text{ m}, h_{SEA}=1,5\text{ m}$
**Odrediti:** $\bar{\rho}_{u20}=?$

**Rješenje:**
$p_{dno} = p_{atm} + \rho_v g (\bar{\rho}_{SAE}h_{SAE} + \bar{\rho}_u h_u + 1 \cdot h_v + \bar{\rho}_{Hg}h_{Hg})$
Uvrštavanjem: $217700 = 101030 + 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot (0,89 \cdot 1,5 + \bar{\rho}_u \cdot 2,9 + 1 \cdot 2,5 + 13,6 \cdot 0,4)$
