Rješavanjem po $\bar{\rho}_u$ dobivamo: $\mathbf{\bar{\rho}_u = 0,911}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 19: Višeslojna tekućina -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z19-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Tlak u višeslojnom spremniku</h3></div>
    <div class="controls" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:15px; background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
        <div class="control-group"><label>Visina ulja h1: <span id="val-h1-19">2</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="slider-h1-19" min="0" max="5" value="2" step="0.5" style="width:100%;"></div>
        <div class="control-group"><label>Gustoća ρ1: <span id="val-rho-19">900</span> kg/m³</label>
        <input type="range" id="slider-rho-19" min="800" max="1100" value="900" step="10" style="width:100%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="metrics" style="background:#2d3748; color:white; padding:10px; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; margin-top:15px;">
        <span>TLAK NA DNU = <b id="out-p-bottom">0</b> Pa</span>
    </div>
    <canvas id="canvas-z19-vfinal" width="500" height="250" style="width:100%; margin-top:15px;"></canvas>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z19-vfinal'), ctx_z19 = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const slH1 = document.getElementById('slider-h1-19'), slRho = document.getElementById('slider-rho-19');
        function update_z19() {
            const h1 = parseFloat(slH1.value), rho1 = parseFloat(slRho.value), p = rho1 * 9.81 * h1 + 1000 * 9.81 * 2;
            document.getElementById('val-h1-19').textContent = h1; document.getElementById('val-rho-19').textContent = rho1;
            document.getElementById('out-p-bottom').textContent = Math.round(p);
            ctx_z19.clearRect(0,0,500,250); ctx_z19.fillStyle="#f1c40f"; ctx_z19.fillRect(100, 50, 100, h1*20);
            ctx_z19.fillStyle="#3498db"; ctx_z19.fillRect(100, 50 + h1*20, 100, 40);
        }
        slH1.oninput = slRho.oninput = update_z19; update_z19();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 20: Intravenozna infuzija

**Tekst zadatka:** 
20. Intravenozna infuzija obično se vrši gravitacijski ovješenjem spremnika tekućine na dovoljnoj visini koja će nadvladati tlak krvi unutar krvnih žila te potisnuti fluid unutar tijela. Gustoća tekućine iznosi $\rho_i = 1020 \, [kg/m^3]$.
a) Potrebno je odrediti pretlak krvi, $p_{k1} = ?$, kada je hidrostatski tlak tekućine izjednačen s visinom krvi. Spremnik je $h_{i1} = 1,2 \, [m]$ iznad mjesta primanja infuzije.
b) Odrediti visinu ovješenja, $h_{i2} = ?$, za dostatan protok ukoliko potreban pretlak treba iznositi $p_{k2} = 20000 \, [Pa]$.
c) U toku primanja infuzije osobi se poveća tlak na $180 \, [mmHg]$ potrebno je odrediti novu visinu, $h_{i3} = ?$, ovješenja za dostatan protok.

**Zadano:**
* $h_{i1} = 1,2 \, [m], p_{k2} = 20000 \, [Pa], \rho_i = 1020 \, [kg/m^3], p_{mmHg} = 180 \, [mmHg]$

**Odrediti:**
$p_{k1} = ?, h_{i2} = ?, h_{i3} = ?$

**Rješenje:**
a) $p_{k1} = \rho_i g h_{i1} = 1020 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1,2 = \mathbf{12007,4 \, Pa} \approx \mathbf{12 \text{ kPa}}$.
b) $h_{i2} = \frac{p_{k2}}{\rho_i g} = \frac{20000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,0 \text{ m}}$.
c) $180 \text{ mmHg} = 180 \cdot 133,322 = 23998 \, Pa \approx 24 \, kPa \implies h_{i3} = \frac{24000}{1020 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{2,4 \text{ m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 20: Simulator IV Infuzije -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z20-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="lab-header"><h3 style="margin:0; color:#1e293b;">💉 Simulator IV Infuzije</h3></div>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap:20px; margin-top:20px;">
        <div class="controls-panel" style="background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
            <label>Visina h: <span id="h-val-z20">1.2</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="h-slider-z20" min="0.5" max="3.0" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width:100%;">
            <label style="display:block; margin-top:15px;">Krvni tlak: <span id="bp-val-z20">120</span> mmHg</label>
            <input type="range" id="bp-slider-z20" min="60" max="200" step="5" value="120" style="width:100%;">
            <div id="flow-status-z20" style="margin-top:20px; padding:10px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; border-radius:8px;">...</div>
        </div>
        <canvas id="canvas-z20-vfinal" width="400" height="300" style="width:100%; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:12px;"></canvas>
    </div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-z20-vfinal'), ctx_z20 = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const hS = document.getElementById('h-slider-z20'), bpS = document.getElementById('bp-slider-z20');
        function drawIV() {
            const h = parseFloat(hS.value), bp = parseFloat(bpS.value)*133.3, ph = 1020*9.81*h, canF = ph > bp;
            document.getElementById('h-val-z20').textContent = h.toFixed(1); document.getElementById('bp-val-z20').textContent = bpS.value;
            const st = document.getElementById('flow-status-z20'); st.textContent = canF ? "PROTOK OK ✓" : "POVRAT ✗";
            st.style.background = canF ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5"; st.style.color = canF ? "#27ae60" : "#e53e3e";
            ctx_z20.clearRect(0,0,400,300); ctx_z20.fillStyle="#fbd38d"; ctx_z20.fillRect(50,250,300,20);
            ctx_z20.fillStyle="#ebf8ff"; ctx_z20.fillRect(180, 250-h*60, 40, 50); ctx_z20.strokeStyle="#3182ce"; ctx_z20.strokeRect(180, 250-h*60, 40, 50);
        }
        hS.oninput = bpS.oninput = drawIV; drawIV();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 21: Utjecaj težine zraka

**Tekst zadatka:** 
21. Zatvoreni spremnik sa slike temperature je 20[°C]. Apsolutni tlak u točki A iznosi 98 [kPa]. Gustoća zraka pri 20 [°C] iznosi $\rho_z = 1,2041 \, [kg/m^3]$ (Kraut).
a) Potrebno je odrediti apsolutni tlak u točki B.
b) Potrebno je odrediti pogrešku uzrokovanu zanemarivanjem utjecaja specifične težine zraka.

**Zadano:**
* $t = 20[°C], p_A = 98000 \, [Pa], \rho_{z20} = 1,2041 \, [kg/m^3], h_{zA} = 5 \, [m], h_{vA} = 3 \, [m]$
* $h_{zB} = 3 \, [m], h_{vB} = 5 \, [m], \rho_{v20} = 998 \, [kg/m^3]$

**Odrediti:**
$p_B = ?, \Delta p_{err} = ?$

**Rješenje:**
a) Postavljanjem jednadžbe od A do B preko zraka i vode:
$p_B = p_A + \rho_z g (h_{zA} - h_{zB}) - \rho_v g (h_{vB} - h_{vA})$
$p_B = 98000 + 1,2041 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = \mathbf{78443,2 \text{ Pa}}$.
b) Bez utjecaja zraka: $p_B = p_A - \rho_v g \Delta h_v = 98000 - 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2 = 78419,6 \text{ Pa}$.
Pogreška $\Delta p_{err} = 78443,2 - 78419,6 = 23,6 \, Pa \approx \mathbf{0,03\%}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 21: Utjecaj težine zraka -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z21-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Utjecaj težine zraka</h3></div>
    <div class="controls" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:15px; background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
        <div class="control-group"><label>Tlak pA: <span id="val-pa21">100</span> kPa</label>
        <input type="range" id="slider-pa21" min="80" max="120" value="100" style="width:100%;"></div>
        <div class="control-group"><label>Visina Δh: <span id="val-hv21">5</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="slider-hv21" min="1" max="10" value="5" style="width:100%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="metrics" style="background:#2d3748; color:white; padding:10px; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; margin-top:15px;">
        <span>pB = <b id="out-pb21">0</b> Pa | GREŠKA = <b id="out-err21">0.00</b> %</span>
    </div>
    <script>
        (function() {
            const slPa = document.getElementById('slider-pa21'), slHv = document.getElementById('slider-hv21');
            function update_z21() {
                const pA = parseFloat(slPa.value)*1000, hv = parseFloat(slHv.value), g = 9.81;
                const pB_e = pA + 1.2*g*hv - 1000*g*hv, pB_a = pA - 1000*g*hv, err = Math.abs((pB_e-pB_a)/pB_e)*100;
                document.getElementById('val-pa21').textContent = slPa.value; document.getElementById('val-hv21').textContent = hv;
                document.getElementById('out-pb21').textContent = Math.round(pB_e); document.getElementById('out-err21').textContent = err.toFixed(4);
            }
            slPa.oninput = slHv.oninput = update_z21; update_z21();
        })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak 22: Manometar na planini

**Tekst zadatka:** 
22. Voda u spremniku predtlačena je zrakom, pri čemu se tlak očitava pomoću višefluidnog manometra kao što je prikazano na slici. Spremnik se nalazi na planini nadmorske visine 1400[m] pri čemu atmosferski tlak iznosi 85,6 [kPa]. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak zraka u spremniku $p_{m1}$. Zadano h1 =0,1 [m], h2 =0,2 [m], h3 =0,46 [m], ulja 850 [kg/m3] te žive 13600 [kg/m3]. Pretpostaviti jednoliku raspodjelu tlaka zraka po visini u spremniku, budući da je gustoća zraka relativno niska spram ostalih medija.

**Zadano:**
* $h = 1400[m], p_{atm} = 85600 \, [Pa], h_1 = 0,1 \, [m], h_2 = 0,2 \, [m], h_3 = 0,46 \, [m]$
* $\rho_v = 1000 \, [kg/m^3], \rho_u = 850 \, [kg/m^3], \rho_{Hg} = 13600 \, [kg/m^3]$

**Odrediti:**
Pretlak zraka u spremniku $p_{m1} = ?$

**Rješenje:**
Tlak zraka u spremniku je jednoliko raspoređen. Postavljanjem jednadžbe manometra:
$p_1 + \rho_v g h_1 + \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_{Hg} g h_3 = p_{atm}$
$p_1 - p_{atm} = \rho_{Hg} g h_3 - \rho_u g h_2 - \rho_v g h_2$
$p_{m1} = 9,81 \cdot (13600 \cdot 0,46 - 850 \cdot 0,2 - 1000 \cdot 0,1) = \mathbf{58723 \, [Pa]} \approx \mathbf{58,7 \text{ kPa}}$.
Apsolutni tlak u posudi iznosi: $p_1 = p_{m1} + p_{atm} = 58723 + 85600 = \mathbf{144,3 \text{ kPa}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 22: Višefluidni manometar -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-z22-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Manometar i nadmorska visina</h3></div>
    <div class="controls" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:15px; background:#f8fafc; padding:15px; border-radius:12px;">
        <div class="control-group"><label>Visina: <span id="val-alt22">0</span> m</label>
        <input type="range" id="slider-alt22" min="0" max="3000" value="0" step="100" style="width:100%;"></div>
        <div class="control-group"><label>Visina Hg h3: <span id="val-h3-22">460</span> mm</label>
        <input type="range" id="slider-h3-22" min="100" max="1000" value="460" step="10" style="width:100%;"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="metrics" style="background:#2d3748; color:white; padding:10px; border-radius:8px; text-align:center; margin-top:15px;">
        <span>p_atm = <b id="out-patm22">0</b> kPa | p_abs = <b id="out-pabs22">0</b> kPa</span>
    </div>
    <script>
        (function() {
            const slAlt = document.getElementById('slider-alt22'), slH3 = document.getElementById('slider-h3-22');
            function update_z22() {
                const alt = parseFloat(slAlt.value), h3 = parseFloat(slH3.value)/1000, p_atm = 101.3*Math.exp(-alt/8000);
                const p_g = (13600*9.81*h3 - 1000*9.81*0.1 - 850*9.81*0.2)/1000, p_abs = p_atm + p_g;
                document.getElementById('val-alt22').textContent = alt; document.getElementById('val-h3-22').textContent = Math.round(h3*1000);
                document.getElementById('out-patm22').textContent = p_atm.toFixed(1); document.getElementById('out-pabs22').textContent = p_abs.toFixed(1);
            }
            slAlt.oninput = slH3.oninput = update_z22; update_z22();
        })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

## Bonus interaktivni sadržaj

### Bonus 1: Utrka viskoznosti (Stokesov zakon)

U ovom widgetu možete vidjeti kako se terminalna brzina pada kuglice mijenja ovisno o viskoznosti fluida i gustoći materijala. Prema Stokesovom zakonu, sila otpora je $F_d = 6 \pi \mu R v$.

```{=html}
<!-- BONUS 1: Redizajnirana Utrka Viskoznosti -->
<div class="widget-container" id="bonus-1-vfinal" style="max-width: 950px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px;">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Eksperiment: Terminalna brzina (Stokes)</h3></div>
    <div class="controls" style="margin-bottom:15px;">
        <select id="mat-select-final" style="padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px;">
            <option value="7800">Čelik</option>
            <option value="2700">Aluminij</option>
        </select>
        <button class="btn" id="btn-race-final">🏁 POKRENI</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:15px;">
        <canvas id="canvas-race-final" width="400" height="400" style="background:#2c3e50; border-radius:8px;"></canvas>
        <canvas id="canvas-chart-final" width="400" height="400" style="background:white; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px;"></canvas>
    </div>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const cR = document.getElementById('canvas-race-final'), cC = document.getElementById('canvas-chart-final');
        const ctx_r = cR.getContext('2d'), ctx_c = cC.getContext('2d');
        const fluids = [{n:'Voda', m:0.001, c:'#3498db'}, {n:'Ulje', m:0.05, c:'#f1c40f'}, {n:'Glicerin', m:1.0, c:'#95a5a6'}, {n:'Med', m:5.0, c:'#e67e22'}];
        let balls = [], animId = null;
        function draw_stokes() {
            ctx_r.clearRect(0,0,400,400); fluids.forEach((f,i)=>{ ctx_r.fillStyle=f.c; ctx_r.globalAlpha=0.2; ctx_r.fillRect(i*100,0,100,400); ctx_r.globalAlpha=1; ctx_r.fillStyle="white"; ctx_r.fillText(f.n, i*100+30, 390); });
            balls.forEach(b=>{ ctx_r.save(); ctx_r.shadowBlur=10; ctx_r.shadowColor="black"; ctx_r.fillStyle="#bdc3c7"; ctx_r.beginPath(); ctx_r.arc(b.x, b.y, 10, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_r.fill(); ctx_r.restore(); });
        }
        function loop_stokes() {
            let moving = false; balls.forEach(b=>{ if(b.y < 380) { moving=true; const vt = (2/9)*Math.pow(0.005,2)*9.81*(b.rho-1000)/b.fluid.m; b.v += (vt-b.v)*0.1; b.y += b.v*50; if(b.h.length<100) b.h.push(b.v); } });
            draw_stokes(); if(moving) animId=requestAnimationFrame(loop_stokes);
        }
        document.getElementById('btn-race-final').onclick = () => { if(animId) cancelAnimationFrame(animId); balls = fluids.map((f,i)=>({x:50+i*100, y:30, v:0, fluid:f, rho:parseFloat(document.getElementById('mat-select-final').value), h:[]})); loop_stokes(); };
        draw_stokes();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Bonus 2: Nenjutnovski Fluidi

Razlika između Newtonskih fluida (viskoznost konstantna), shear-thinning (viskoznost pada s brzinom smicanja) i shear-thickening (viskoznost raste).

```{=html}
<!-- BONUS 2: Non-Newtonian Fluids -->
<div class="widget-container" id="bonus-2-vfinal" style="max-width: 850px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 25px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
    <div class="widget-header"><h3 class="widget-title">Nenjutnovski Fluidi</h3></div>
    <div class="controls" style="margin-bottom:15px;"><label>Shear Rate:</label><input type="range" id="sl-rheo" min="0" max="100" value="50" style="width:100%;">
    <div style="margin-top:10px;"><button class="btn" id="bn-n">Newtonski</button><button class="btn" id="bn-t">Shear-Thinning</button><button class="btn" id="bn-th">Shear-Thickening</button></div></div>
    <canvas id="canvas-rheo-final" width="600" height="200" style="width:100%; border:1px solid #eee;"></canvas>
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-rheo-final'), ctx_rh = canvas.getContext('2d'), sl = document.getElementById('sl-rheo');
        let type = 'n', particles = Array.from({length:30}, ()=>({x:Math.random()*600, y:Math.random()*200}));
        function update_rh() {
            const shear = parseFloat(sl.value); ctx_rh.clearRect(0,0,600,200);
            particles.forEach(p => { 
                p.x += (shear/10)*(1-p.y/200)*10; if(p.x>600) p.x=0; 
                ctx_rh.fillStyle = type==='th'?'#8e44ad':(type==='t'?'#c0392b':'#3498db');
                ctx_rh.beginPath(); ctx_rh.arc(p.x, p.y, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx_rh.fill();
            });
            requestAnimationFrame(update_rh);
        }
        document.getElementById('bn-n').onclick = () => type = 'n'; document.getElementById('bn-t').onclick = () => type = 't'; document.getElementById('bn-th').onclick = () => type = 'th';
        update_rh();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```
